input.message:
Subject: Software Engineer Opportunity

From: recruiter@techcorp.com

Hi,

I came across your profile and was impressed. We have an opening for a Senior Software Engineer. Would you be interested in learning more?

Best regards,
Sarah

tasks.description: Respond to recruiter about job opportunity

expected.reply_quality: professional, shows interest, asks for next steps

input.message:
Subject: Meeting Request

From: colleague@company.com

Hi,

Can we schedule a meeting to discuss the Q4 project? I'm free Tuesday afternoon or Wednesday morning.

Thanks!

tasks.description: Schedule meeting for Q4 project discussion

input.message:

From: professor@university.edu

Dear Students,

Due to technical issues, I'm extending the deadline for Assignment 3 to Friday, December 15th at 11:59 PM.

Prof. Smith

Subject: Technical Issue

From: user@example.com

Hi Support,

I'm having trouble logging into my account. I keep getting an error message. Can you help?

Thanks!

expected.reply_quality: empathetic, asks clarifying questions, provides help
